scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run build:single && npm run build:separate && npm run build:direct
scripts.analyze: echo '=== SINGLE FILE ===' && echo '--- page1 chunk ---' && cat dist/single/page1.js 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- page2 chunk ---' && cat dist/single/page2.js 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- shared chunks ---' && ls dist/single/*.js 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== SEPARATE FILES ===' && echo '--- page1 chunk ---' && cat dist/separate/page1.js 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- page2 chunk ---' && cat dist/separate/page2.js 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- shared chunks ---' && ls dist/separate/*.js 2>/dev/null
